title: Require Service Private Alias Ownership
forbids: a private service/API alias used outside its matching repository owner or across owner kinds
why: A private alias is an owner-local service-interior path, never a second public dependency surface.
remediate: Use #<owner>-service/* only below services/<owner> or #<owner>-api/* only below plugins/server/api/<owner>; cross-project callers use the dependency's public package exports.
message: Private service/API aliases must remain inside their matching repository owner.
